title: Rang Ratta
overview: The movie Rang Ratta is a love story. The movie’s protagonist, ”Karan” crosses paths with a taxi driver named “Simran” and from there they continue getting to know each other. The current tense and Karan’s past tense are switched back and forth in the narrative, where the romantic history of the hero is told.
